effective_instruction: Write a comprehensive study guide on the Transcendental Idealism & Dialectics (Kant & Hegel), covering its basics, common pitfalls, and real-world scenarios.Include a worked real world scenario for each major concept, and a checklist of the key topics to cover. It should be very verbose and detailed with many subsections and subtopics.Generated content should be on the level of a university philosophy textbook, with detailed subsections and subtopics. Every subsection must have very big paragraphs and detailed explanations.
